title: Age Of Emparium - A Democratic & Create Server+
description: Ever wanted to actually shape the server you play on? On Emparium, players form empires, build massive contraptions with Create and Mekanism, fly airships with Aeronautics — and govern the world together through a real democratic system.
body:
Ever wanted to actually shape the server you play on? On Emparium, players form empires, build massive contraptions with Create and Mekanism, fly airships with Aeronautics — and govern the world together through a real democratic system.

## About The Server

The server is based on a democratic system, with the 3 powers of government being separated to the legislative; the judicial assigned to the Chief Justice and the Supreme Court; and the executive which is assigned to the office of the owner. 

- **Players have the power** to add, remove and change mods, states of the server and add or remove things from the **_Constitution of Empires of Emparium_** (our server's in-game rules/laws) using amendments, in the Council.
- The server uses another system called _**Server Rules**_, which can neither be changed by the Council nor players, only by the Owner. The players can give feedback to the Owner or the Server Security about the **_Server Rules_** so it can change accordingly.
- The Server Security is the helping hand of the Office of the Owner, they are similar to administrators/moderators and they **must** follow the rules themselves as well as all the other systems of the server (this applies to everyone, even the owner has to follow all the systems of the server)


You can find see/find the server's interactive map here: [AOE-Bluemap](http://194.54.88.35:25583/#world:224:0:-279:13841:-0.01:0:0:0:perspective)


### Where else we need your help

We might not have many players active like other popular servers yet but you can change this - by joining and playing - you are helping the server shape into something better and more fun to play... In this way more and more people will be attracted in joining and having fun too !

# PLEASE JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER TO READ THE RULES
# AND REGISTER YOUR EMPIRE [AOE-Discord](https://discord.gg/vc3Y7wrXhb)

## Credits & Permissions (of the modpack)

### Mods with permissive licenses
(The following are from CurseForge)
- [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia) (MIT)
- [EpheroLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epherolib) (LGPL)
- [Chisels & Bits - For Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisels-bits) (LGPL)
- [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) (LGPL)
- [Refurbished Furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture) ([Custom-License](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture/files/all#license), allows redistribution of the unmodified mod file (e.g. in modpacks) )


### Mods requiring explicit permission or special handling
